description: Perform a FEMA levee accreditation check for the Muncie flood model located in '~/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie'. Using the levee survey file 'levee_survey.csv', run the HEC-RAS Unsteady simulation (Plan 04) and extract the Maximum Water Surface Elevation (WSE) profile. Compute the freeboard (Levee Elev - Max WSE) for each survey point by interpolating WSE values to the survey stations. Generate a compliance report named 'levee_compliance.csv' in '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/' with columns 'Station_ft', 'Levee_Top_Elev_ft', 'Modeled_WSE_ft', 'Freeboard_ft', and 'Status' (assign 'FAIL' if freeboard < 3.0 ft, otherwise 'PASS'). Additionally, generate a visualization plot named 'levee_profile.png' showing the Levee Top and Max WSE profiles.
